mapper.select: SELECT id , content_key , content_body , created_at , use_yn FROM site_content ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id , content_key , content_body , created_at , use_yn FROM site_content WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT id , content_key , content_body , created_at , use_yn FROM site_content WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id , content_key , content_body , created_at , use_yn FROM site_content WHERE content_key = #{contentKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_content ( id, content_key, content_body, created_at, use_yn ) VALUES ( seq_site_content.NEXTVAL, #{contentKey}, #{contentBody}, SYSDATE, 'Y' )
